title: RunManifest
description: Per-run state file driving the deterministic dvg run pipeline. Encodes per-stage status, depends_on DAG (cascading invalidation), durations, and costs.

config.description: Resolved run configuration (capture mode, target duration, etc.).

stages.description: Ordered pipeline stages. Driver walks this in order and dispatches the owning agent for any stage whose artifact is missing.

name.description: Stable stage identifier (e.g. capture, analyze, music, compose).

artifact.description: Path (relative to run dir) of the artifact this stage produces.

owner.description: Agent name responsible for this stage.

depends_on.description: Names of upstream stages whose artifacts this stage consumes. Drives --from cascading invalidation.

artifact_sha256.description: SHA256 of the produced artifact bytes. Driver uses this for content-aware --from invalidation: if a re-run produces an identical hash, downstream cascading is skipped.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost of this stage (LLM tokens + API calls).

attempts.description: Number of times the driver has dispatched this stage.
